elements.label: Before booking, please sign in or create a profile.
Please review the new policies at www.parks.ca.gov/reservationpolicies.
Create Your Next Adventure in a California State Park.
Search by City or Park Name
Begin your adventure by logging into your account or creating a new customer profile. We look forward to your stay.
California State Park Adventure Pass—Free day-use passes for fourth graders attending a public school in California and their families to 54 participating state parks.
California State Library Parks Pass—Free vehicle day-use entry pass to over 200 participating state park units operated by State Parks for check out to library-card holders.
Golden Bear Pass—CalWORKs families can receive a free annual vehicle day-use pass to over 200 participating state parks and beaches operated by State Parks.
Also, please remember to recreate responsibly by planning ahead, playing it safe, and leaving no trace. For safety tips, please click here.
Being selected in the drawing still requires payment for the reservation. However, even if not selected, participating will improve the chances of being selected in future drawings.
To learn more about the Reservation Drawings program, visit the FAQs.
Before booking, please sign in or create a profile.
Please review the new policies at www.parks.ca.gov/reservationpolicies.
